name: LinkStack
description: A highly customizable link sharing platform
compose:
name: slashnode-linkstack
services:
  linkstack:
    image: linkstackorg/linkstack:latest
    container_name: linkstack
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    volumes:
      - linkstack_linkstack_data:/htdocs
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:8190:80
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  linkstack_linkstack_data:
    name: slashnode-linkstack_linkstack_linkstack_data
